items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic candidate-to-request integrity.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of deterministic candidate-to-request integrity, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or checks that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for such integrity but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or verification. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence to support the requirement.
